content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift implements a custom star-rating gate that routes only 4-5 star users to a direct `itms-apps://...write-review` link while diverting lower ratings to a feedback form, bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; description.txt also solicits "rate us 5 stars!" (App/RatingGateView.swift:9-22, fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple explicitly disallows custom review prompts and gating review requests based on sentiment (5.6.1) since this manipulates App Store rating data and erodes discovery trust (5.6.3/3.2.2x). Replace this custom flow entirely with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)`/`AppStore.requestReview`, which Apple triggers non-deterministically and shows to all users regardless of star selection, and remove the "rate us 5 stars" language from the description.
